description.value:
At level 11, you refine your savage instincts, using your "gifts" in increasingly creative, yet brutal. ways. You can now execute two devastating attacks using your bite or kick.
You can make these techniques when the target has at least 5 ranks of hopeless.
Additionally, You can choose to automatically inflict hopeless ranks instead of fear ranks.
On a hit the target loses 5 of its hopeless ranks.

  • Savage Bite You lunge at an enemy's throat, aiming to tear into their vitals. Make a single bite attack applying hopeless ranks as if it was a normal attack. If the attack hits, its effectiveness depends on how much your roll exceeds the target's AC:
    0 to 4 over AC → Deals double your bite damage and inflicts 2 ranks of Bleeding.
    5 to 9 over AC → Deals triple your bite damage and inflicts 3 ranks of Bleeding.
    10+ over AC → Deals five times your bite damage and inflicts 1 rank of Lacerated.

  • Brutal Kick You deliver a devastating dropkick, sending enemies flying. Make a single kick attack applying hopeless ranks as if it was a normal attack. If it hits, the effect is based on how much your roll exceeds the target's AC:
    0 to 4 over AC → Deals double your kick damage, inflicts 2 ranks of Bruised, and knocks the target 10 ft backward.
    5 to 9 over AC → Deals triple your kick damage, inflicts 3 ranks of Bruised, and knocks the target 20 ft backward.
    10+ over AC → Deals five times your kick damage, inflicts 1 rank of Staggered, and knocks the target 30 ft backward.
    If the enemy collides with another creature or a solid surface, they take falling damage as if they had fallen from the distance they were pushed.

At level 15, you ascend to the rank of Apex Predator, a being of pure terror that no prey can escape. Your deadly gaze and presence alone strike fear into even the bravest foes.
No creature can have advantage, resistance, or immunity to the Fear/Hopeless conditions while in your presence. All Hopeless ranks you inflict are doubled, regardless of the source.
Additionally, you unlock a devastating new technique that merges your Savage Bite and Brutal Kick into a single, overwhelming assault.
The target need to have 10 ranks of hopeless and on a hit the target loses 10 hopeless ranks.
As a full turn action you leap onto your target, sinking your teeth into them before launching them away with a vicious kick. Make a bite or kick attack, adding any ranks of Hopeless to the attack roll. If it hits, the attack scales based on how much your roll exceeds the target's AC:
0 to 3 over AC → Deals 2 ranks of Bleeding and Bruised, then combines the damage of both Bite + Kick, double it, and knocks the target 15 ft backward.
4 to 7 over AC → Deals 4 ranks of Bleeding and Bruised, then combines the damage of both Bite + Kick, triple it, and knocks the target 30 ft backward.
8+ over AC → Inflicts Lacerated and Staggered, then combines the damage of both Bite + Kick, multiply by five, and knocks the target 50 ft backward.
If the enemy collides with another creature or a solid surface, they take falling damage as if they had fallen from the distance they were pushed.
